back_to_favorites: Rov qab mus rau cov nyiam

no_favorites.title: Tsis muaj dab tsi nyob ntawm no :(

local_list.title: Kuv Cov Kev Pabcuam Uas Kuv Tau Khaws Cia
local_list.description: Cov peev txheej uas koj khaws cia ntawm no khaws cia rau hauv koj tus browser. Sau npe kom khaws cia rau txhua lub cuab yeej.
local_list.loading: Tab tom thauj cov peev txheej uas tau khaws cia lawm...
local_list.empty_title: Tsis tau muaj cov peev txheej khaws cia tseem
local_list.empty_description: Nyem lub cim plawv ntawm txhua qhov chaw muab kev pab kom ntxiv nws rau ntawm no. Koj cov kev xaiv tau khaws cia rau hauv qhov browser no.

purge_list.label: Tshem tawm tag nrho
purge_list.confirm_description: Qhov no yuav tshem tawm tag nrho cov peev txheej ntawm daim ntawv teev npe. Daim ntawv teev npe nws tus kheej yuav nyob.
purge_list.success: Tshem tawm tag nrho cov nyiam
purge_list.error: Tsis tau tshem tawm cov nyiam

print_dialog.title: Luam Tawm Phau Ntawv Qhia

print_dialog.popup_blocked: Cov qhov rais qhib tau raug thaiv. Thov tso cai rau cov qhov rais qhib kom pom cov PDF.

print_dialog.line_listing: Daim ntawv teev xov tooj (line book)

print_dialog.full_listing: Daim ntawv teev tag nrho (cov ntaub ntawv qhia txog kev pabcuam)

print_dialog.loading_resources: Thauj cov ntaub ntawv qhia txog cov peev txheej...
print_dialog.load_error: Tsis tuaj yeem thauj cov ntaub ntawv qhia txog cov peev txheej uas luam tawm tau. Thov sim dua.

print_footer_disclaimer: {{brandName}} muab cov ntaub ntawv no ua kev pabcuam rau pej xeem thiab tsis muaj kev lees paub txog nws qhov tseeb, kev ua tiav, lossis kev ua tiav raws sijhawm. {{brandName}} tsis muaj lub luag haujlwm rau kev siv cov ntaub ntawv no li cas thiab tsis lees paub lub luag haujlwm rau txhua qhov tshwm sim los ntawm kev siv nws. Kev faib tawm ntawm daim ntawv luam tawm no tsis txhais tau tias pom zoo los ntawm lossis koom nrog {{brandName}}.
